creator: pgollucci@p6m7g8.com
text:
1.07 is broken, I've intentionally not updated it.
 
 I'm the CPAN maintainer and svn committers for it so need to send prs 
 for this port.
 
 
 
 Sylvio Cesar wrote:
 >> Submitter-Id:	current-users
 >> Originator:	Sylvio Cesar
 >> Organization:	
 >> Confidential:	no 
 >> Synopsis:	[PATCH] www/p5-Apache-DBI: update to 1.07
 >> Severity:	non-critical
 >> Priority:	low
 >> Category:	ports 
 >> Class:		update
 >> Release:	FreeBSD 7.2-RELEASE i386
 >> Environment:
 > System: FreeBSD fbsd_tb7st.vida.br 7.2-RELEASE FreeBSD 7.2-RELEASE #0: Fri May  1 08:49:13 UTC
 >> Description:
 > - Update to 1.07
 > 
 > Port maintainer (pgollucci@FreeBSD.org) is cc'd.
 > 
 > Generated with FreeBSD Port Tools 0.77
 >> How-To-Repeat:
 >> Fix:
 > 
 > --- p5-Apache-DBI-1.07_1.patch begins here ---
 > Index: Makefile
 > ===================================================================
 > RCS file: /home/ncvs/ports/www/p5-Apache-DBI/Makefile,v
 > retrieving revision 1.30
 > diff -u -u -r1.30 Makefile
 > --- Makefile	16 May 2009 06:27:53 -0000	1.30
 > +++ Makefile	28 Jun 2009 03:44:27 -0000
 > @@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 >  #
 >  
 >  PORTNAME?=	Apache-DBI
 > -PORTVERSION=	1.06
 > +PORTVERSION=	1.07
 >  PORTREVISION?=	1
 >  CATEGORIES=	www databases perl5
 >  MASTER_SITES=	CPAN
 > @@ -15,12 +15,12 @@
 >  MAINTAINER=	pgollucci@FreeBSD.org
 >  COMMENT?=	DBI persistent connection, authentication and authorization
 >  
 > -SLAVEDIRS=  www/p5-Apache-DBI-mp1 www/p5-Apache-DBI-mp2
 > -
 >  BUILD_DEPENDS=	${SITE_PERL}/${PERL_ARCH}/DBI.pm:${PORTSDIR}/databases/p5-DBI
 > -RUN_DEPENDS=	${SITE_PERL}/${PERL_ARCH}/DBI.pm:${PORTSDIR}/databases/p5-DBI
 > +RUN_DEPENDS=	${BUILD_DEPENDS}
 > +
 > +SLAVEDIRS=	www/p5-Apache-DBI-mp1 www/p5-Apache-DBI-mp2
 >  
 > -MAKE_JOBS_SAFE=  yes
 > +MAKE_JOBS_SAFE=	yes
 >  
 >  MAN3=		Apache::DBI.3 Apache::AuthDBI.3
 >  
 > @@ -34,13 +34,13 @@
 >  BUILD_DEPENDS+=	${SITE_PERL}/${PERL_ARCH}/mod_perl.pm:${PORTSDIR}/www/mod_perl
 >  .endif
 >  
 > -PLIST_FILES= %%SITE_PERL%%/Apache/DBI.pm \
 > -	%%SITE_PERL%%/Apache/AuthDBI.pm \
 > -	%%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/auto/Apache/DBI/.packlist
 > -
 > -PLIST_DIRS= %%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/auto/Apache/DBI \
 > -	%%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/auto/Apache \
 > -	%%SITE_PERL%%/Apache
 > +PLIST_FILES=	%%SITE_PERL%%/Apache/DBI.pm \
 > +		%%SITE_PERL%%/Apache/AuthDBI.pm \
 > +		%%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/auto/Apache/DBI/.packlist
 > +
 > +PLIST_DIRS=	%%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/auto/Apache/DBI \
 > +		%%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/auto/Apache \
 > +		%%SITE_PERL%%/Apache
 >  
 >  .include <bsd.port.pre.mk>
 >  
 > Index: distinfo
 > ===================================================================
 > RCS file: /home/ncvs/ports/www/p5-Apache-DBI/distinfo,v
 > retrieving revision 1.15
 > diff -u -u -r1.15 distinfo
 > --- distinfo	25 Mar 2007 09:11:59 -0000	1.15
 > +++ distinfo	28 Jun 2009 03:44:27 -0000
 > @@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
 > -MD5 (Apache-DBI-1.06.tar.gz) = ba05c9b7a437e8d974c81d948d162825
 > -SHA256 (Apache-DBI-1.06.tar.gz) = 1ab96005ffab77b53a23edfb1325f87a0934ee3a54968139871becec1acfe947
 > -SIZE (Apache-DBI-1.06.tar.gz) = 33833
 > +MD5 (Apache-DBI-1.07.tar.gz) = a8161e5c1083afa0ecb6ac94491481e0
 > +SHA256 (Apache-DBI-1.07.tar.gz) = a4a8c85be59de5f75a44061e258583e4e34ea323efdbc50e48b6bb6c1bd57d1c
